name: Flaky Salmon Surprise
recipeInstructions:
1. Pre-heat the oven to 220°C (450°F) or Gas mark 8.
2. Drain the canned salmon and reserve the juice. Set aside.
3. Roll out the puff pastry to a thickness of 1/2 cm (1/4 inch).
4. Cut into four rounds, each measuring approximately 8.5 cm (3 inches) in diameter.
5. Place the rounds on a dampened baking tray with the rolled side down and let stand for 30 minutes.
6. Brush the upper surface of each round with milk.
7. Bake until golden, about 10-15 minutes.
8. Cool. Sprinkle cucumber with salt and leave for 15 minutes.
9. Melt butter in a saucepan. Stir in flour, then add the reserved salmon juice and milk. Bring to a boil.
10. Mix well, then add the rinsed cucumber, sour cream, and tarragon. Blend until smooth.
11. Divide each pastry round into three slices crosswise.
12. Place half of the salmon filling on the bottom slice. Add the middle layer, then the remaining filling over it.
13. Top with puff pastry pieces.
14. Serve hot with vegetables. Serves 2. Approx. 800 calories per serving.
